calendar.matters: Petition For: (1) Court Order Finding That The 2004 Trust Was Amended By The 2017 Agreement To Remove Sunny V.H. Luong And His Family Members As Beneficiaries; And (2) Court Order Finding That Sunny V.H. Luang Is Not A Beneficiary Or Trustee Of The 2004 Trust Due To The Termination Of His Domestic Partnership With Decedent

Petition For: (1) Court Order Finding That The 2004 Trust Was Amended By The 2017 Agreement To Remove Sunny V.H. Luong And His Family Members As Beneficiaries; And (2) Court Order Finding That Sunny V.H. Luang Is Not A Beneficiary Or Trustee Of The 2004 Trust Due To The Termination Of His Domestic Partnership With Decedent
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Jul-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Sinclair appeared in person for Sunny Leong (respondent).
Pitchaw Thongkom appeared via zoom (pro per).

Discussion was held regarding the health conditions of Mr. Thongkom, that he is the process of retaining counsel, that he needs more time, and that he will have counsel contact Mr. Sinclair once he retains an attorney. The matter is continued to July 21, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bloom. Not reported.

Petition For: (1) Court Order Finding That The 2004 Trust Was Amended By The 2017 Agreement To Remove Sunny V.H. Luong And His Family Members As Beneficiaries; And (2) Court Order Finding That Sunny V.H. Luang Is Not A Beneficiary Or Trustee Of The 2004 Trust Due To The Termination Of His Domestic Partnership With Decedent
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Continued To May-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Sinclair, Esq. on behalf of the Respondent, Sunny V.H. Luang.
Petitioner Pitchaw Thongkon appearing in pro per.

Parties have not been able to communicate. Petitioner is still looking for a new attorney and requests a continuance with no objection by the Respondent.

Court orders matter continued to May-26-2026 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 for Petitioner to conclude medical treatment and obtain counsel. Court to give time to conduct formal discovery at the next hearing.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: S. Monroe. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

Petition For: (1) Court Order Finding That The 2004 Trust Was Amended By The 2017 Agreement To Remove Sunny V.H. Luong And His Family Members As Beneficiaries; And (2) Court Order Finding That Sunny V.H. Luang Is Not A Beneficiary Or Trustee Of The 2004 Trust Due To The Termination Of His Domestic Partnership With Decedent
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Continued To Feb-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Pitchaw Thongkom, petitioner in pro per.
Dr. Andrew Rombakis, present as a friend of Mr. Thongkom.
John Sinclaire for respondent Sunny Leong.

The matter was called for hearing on the First Amended Petition.

The Court discussed the procedural posture of the case and noted that certain causes of action had survived the demurrer. The Court addressed Mr. Thongkom regarding the challenges of proceeding in pro per and recommended that he retain counsel to assist in prosecuting the remaining causes of action.

The Court received brief status updates from the parties. The Court stated the matter was not ready to proceed further at this time and that additional time was appropriate.

The Court continued the matter to February 17, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For: (1) Court Order Finding That The 2004 Trust Was Amended By The 2017 Agreement To Remove Sunny V.H. Luong And His Family Members As Beneficiaries; And (2) Court Order Finding That Sunny V.H. Luang Is Not A Beneficiary Or Trustee Of The 2004 Trust Due To The Termination Of His Domestic Partnership With Decedent
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Continued To Jan-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffey Oberto appeared via zoom for with Pitchaw Thongkom and Roy Wellman (Petitioner).
David Thompson appeared via zoom for Sunny Leong (respondent).

Counsels stated that they did not resolve at mediation, that they have at least one more deposition to take, and that they are requesting a continuance. The matter is continued to January 6, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

Petition For: (1) Court Order Finding That The 2004 Trust Was Amended By The 2017 Agreement To Remove Sunny V.H. Luong And His Family Members As Beneficiaries; And (2) Court Order Finding That Sunny V.H. Luang Is Not A Beneficiary Or Trustee Of The 2004 Trust Due To The Termination Of His Domestic Partnership With Decedent
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Continued To Aug-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jeffey Oberto appeared via zoom for with Pitchaw Thongkom and Roy Wellman (Petitioner).
Frank Busch appeared via zoom for Sunny Leong (respondent).

Discussion was held regarding mediation on July 10, 2025, that they are working together for ADR, and that any objections will be submitted in writing prior to mediation. The Court stated that any objections are to be filed by April 30, 2025, and also notify status of mediation to the examiner by July 30, 2025. The matter is continued to August 5, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Loke. Not reported.
